expected_issues.description: The controlled prop is named currentPage. Blade's convention for controlled props mirrors React's value/onChange pattern — the prop should be selectedPage with a corresponding defaultSelectedPage for uncontrolled usage and onSelectedPageChange for the callback.

The initial spec only provides a controlled prop (currentPage) with no defaultSelectedPage for uncontrolled usage. Every controllable Blade component must support both the controlled (value + onChange) and uncontrolled (defaultValue) patterns.
showPageNumberSelector is unnecessarily verbose. The shorter showPageNumbers communicates the same meaning and matches the terseness of other boolean show* props in Blade.
